'''Falk''' was the last [[Planet/Legends|planet]] in the [[Genesia system/Legends|Genesia system]]. It was a blue-gray [[Gas giant/Legends|gas giant]] whose nine [[Moon/Legends|moons]] had been stripped-[[Mining/Legends|mined]] by the [[Lant Mining Corporation]].
